name: Lulu Karega-Kenji
education: Master's degree, Information Technology from Strathmore University; Bachelor of Science (BSc), Electronics and Computer Engineering from Jomo Kenyatta University of Agriculture and Technology
headline: Software Engineering| Software Development| Technical Design and Architecture| Testing and Quality Assurance| Technical Support| System Testing
about: Experienced and versatile Software Developer with a proven track record of success in driving the development and support of innovative software solutions. My role involves diagnosing and resolving production service issues, gathering stakeholder requirements, and translating them into scalable software designs. I am proficient in a diverse range of programming languages and frameworks including Java, Python, C#, and JavaScript. I also excel in conducting comprehensive testing to guarantee the quality and functionality of software systems

currentPositions.description:
•	Designing, coding, and debugging software applications, components, and services using programming languages such as C++, C#, Java, or Python. This involves writing efficient and maintainable code that aligns with Microsoft's coding standards and best practices.
•	System and Product Analysis: Collaborating with product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to understand system requirements and translate them into technical specifications. Analyzing user needs and proposing innovative solutions to address complex problems.
•	Conducting various testing activities, including unit testing, integration testing, and performance testing, to ensure the quality, reliability, and performance of software products. Identifying and fixing bugs and issues, and working towards continuous improvement of software quality.
•	Working closely with team members, product managers, and stakeholders to coordinate development efforts and ensure successful project delivery. Participating in code reviews, providing feedback, and fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment.
•	Staying up-to-date with the latest technologies, trends, and industry best practices. Conducting research and exploring innovative approaches to improve software development processes, efficiency, and effectiveness.
•	Creating and maintaining technical documentation, including design documents, system architecture diagrams, API documentation, and user guides. Ensuring clarity and accessibility of documentation for internal teams and external users.
•	Actively engaging in continuous learning and professional development to enhance technical skills and stay abreast of evolving technologies. Participating in training programs, attending conferences, and leveraging internal resources to expand knowledge and expertise.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Developing and supporting JUMO’s platform (both existing and emerging)
•	Diagnosing and correcting any problems with production services
•	Gathering and analyzing requirements from stakeholders to understand the scope and objectives of the software project.
•	Creating technical specifications and architectural designs based on the project requirements, ensuring scalability, reliability, and maintainability of the software system.
•	Writing code according to the design specifications using programming languages and frameworks such as Java, Python, C#, JavaScript, etc.
•	Conducting unit tests, integration tests, and system tests to ensure the quality and functionality of the software. This may involve both manual and automated testing processes.
•	Identifying and fixing bugs, errors, and performance issues in the software code to improve its reliability and performance.
•	Deploying the software application to various environments, including development, testing, staging, and production, ensuring smooth deployment and configuration.
•	Writing technical documentation, including user manuals, API documentation, and system architecture documentation to aid in the understanding and maintenance of the software system

experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Maintaining the existing code, mainly the mobile applications code.
•	Implementing designs and wireframes using efficient code.
•	Identifying bottlenecks and correcting them as well as fixing bugs
•	Maintaining code quality, organization, and automation.
•	Making sure any updates are backward compatible. 
•	Conducting research and exploring innovative approaches to enhance software development processes, efficiency, and effectiveness.
•	Facilitating the deployment and release of software applications to production environments, ensuring smooth and seamless transitions.
•	Engaging with clients to understand their needs, provide technical guidance, and address any concerns or issues related to software development projects.

experiences.title: Deployment Engineer
experiences.jobDescription:
•	Deployment of applications both on-site and off-site and automation of processes
•	Auditing and cleaning up of systems, upgrading and migrating systems
•	Maintaining systems and resolving technical issues
•	Deploying and maintaining the product in six countries

summary: Lulu Karega-Kenji is currently at Microsoft, operating within a large, established enterprise environment and actively promoting open roles on behalf of her team. Her posts frequently focus on recruiting and talent acquisition, sharing job openings (for example, a Senior Sys Dev Engineer), team-building opportunities, and direct application links. Her posting style is concise, promotional and collegial—she tags colleagues like Hannah Olukoye and uses clear calls-to-action rather than long-form commentary. She signals familiarity with technical hiring needs (systems development/engineering) and the hiring pipeline while keeping content accessible to a broad candidate/network audience. Notable patterns include practical, network-driven amplification of roles, emphasis on speeding candidate discovery and referrals, and minimal technical deep dives or industry analysis. Engagement behavior suggests community-mindedness: she leverages tags and shareable links to mobilize her network for outcomes like applications and referrals. Her distinct value proposition is as a connector inside a major tech company, streamlining visibility for technical opportunities and bridging hiring teams with potential candidates in an efficient, action-oriented way.
